title: sorghum pseudoischaemum
intro: Sorghum pseudoischaemum, also known as broomcorn millet or Chinese broom corn, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sorghum pseudoischaemum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of sorghum pseudoischaemum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations.
